title: Pulse Summary
description: Structured output produced by the pulse_strategist skill. The authoritative governance artifact for a pipeline run — synthesizes all telemetry signals into a final risk posture and recommended actions.

project_key.description: Unique project identifier. Must match the key in state.json.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this pulse summary was generated. Must reflect actual wall-clock time of the run.

risk_posture.description: The synthesized risk posture for this project at the time of the run.

open_flags.description: Number of unresolved risk flags at the time of pulse generation.

erp_verdict.description: The ERP verdict at the time of this pulse run, for traceability.

cloud_status.description: The cloud spend status at the time of this pulse run, for traceability.

summary_narrative.description: Plain English narrative summarizing the project's current risk state. Must be grounded in actual telemetry values — no generic text. Minimum 50 characters.

recommended_actions.description: Ordered list of recommended actions. Must contain at least one item. Even GREEN posture requires a maintenance recommendation.

priority.description: P1 = immediate action required, P2 = action within 5 business days, P3 = monitor.

action.description: Specific, actionable recommendation. Must name the responsible system or team.

owner.description: The team, role, or individual responsible for acting on this recommendation.

examples.summary_narrative: ERP setup is verified with an active cost center and PO. However, cloud spend for April MTD is $12,480 against an approved budget of $10,000 — a 24.8% overrun. Two open risk flags remain unresolved from the ITSM queue. Immediate budget review and flag resolution are required before the next sprint cycle.

recommended_actions.action: Initiate an emergency budget review with the FinOps team to reallocate or suppress $2,480 in overrun spend before month-end close.
Resolve the two open ITSM flags (INC-20241 and INC-20243) — both are blocking the cloud resource cleanup task.
